# HonestPawReviews
> Independent reviews and comparisons of dog training programs and pet health products. No paid placements. Rankings based on real testing.

## Pages
- /: Homepage -- overview of all reviews and editorial mission
- /brain-training-for-dogs-review.html: Honest 60-day review of Brain Training for Dogs vs 3 alternatives. Covers anxiety-driven destructive behavior, separation anxiety, and recall response.
- /about.html: About HonestPawReviews and our review methodology
- /privacy.html: Privacy policy
- /terms.html: Terms of use
- /disclaimer.html: Affiliate disclaimer -- ClickBank affiliate relationship disclosed

## Editorial Standards
- No product pays for placement or positive coverage
- All programs tested for a minimum of two weeks before ranking
- Reviews updated when pricing or program content changes
- Affiliate relationships disclosed on every page

## Contact
hello@honestpawreviews.com
